memberdef.argsstring: (const char *filename, const int cache_sign, const CallbackT &callback)
memberdef.name: read_layout

briefdescription.para: Loads a per-source-file (local) refined block layout from a shader cache bindump. Merges the refined block register entries from the cache file into context.rbVars().

parameterdescription.para: Path to the local shader cache file (*.obj or equivalent).
Compilation context whose rbVars map is populated.

simplesect.para: true on success, false if the file could not be read (error is logged).

briefdescription.para: Serialises the current refined block layout from comp into a global cache file. Writes all rbVars entries as a bindump stream.

parameterdescription.para: Path to the output global cache file.
Compilation context whose rbVars map is serialised.

simplesect.para: true on success, false if the file could not be opened for writing.

briefdescription.para: Loads the global refined block layout from a shared cache file produced by save_global_rb_layout(). Merges all stored refined block register entries into context.rbVars().

parameterdescription.para: Path to the global cache file written by save_global_rb_layout().
Compilation context whose rbVars map is populated.

simplesect.para: true on success, false if the file could not be read (error is logged).

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *filename, dag::ConstSpan< String > current_deps, const shc::CompilationContext &ctx, bool check_cppstcode)
memberdef.name: check_scripted_shader
